overview: I upgraded my RAG pipeline from local ChromaDB to hosted Pinecone, added agentic retrieval, and built an MCP-pattern tool server. Agentic RAG scored 4.3 vs 4.0 for standard RAG but used 66% more tokens — a real trade-off.

keyPoints.title: Pinecone replaces ChromaDB: persistent, multi-user, production-ready
Agentic RAG: +0.3 quality points, +66% token cost
MCP pattern: define tools once, all agents inherit them
Strategy Assistant v3: three worker agents with real Pinecone tools
Standard vs. agentic RAG is a cost-quality product call
